title: Gradients2-MGL1704-AA_SRP_UW
author: Angelicque White
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Soluble reactive phosphate (SRP) samples were collected on the SCOPE Gradients 2 cruise in the north Pacific Ocean.  SRP was measured by sampling directly from the R/V Langseth's underway uncontaminated seawater system (intake depth 5m).  Phosphate was determined colormetrically on a SEAL Analytical Autoanalyzer.  Samples were corrected for a DI water blank and a reagent standard curve (4 concentrations) that was run for about 10 min every few hours.
steps_raw: Soluble reactive phosphate (SRP) samples were collected on the SCOPE Gradients 2 cruise in the north Pacific Ocean.  SRP was measured by sampling directly from the R/V Langseth's underway uncontaminated seawater system (intake depth 5m).  Phosphate was determined colormetrically on a SEAL Analytical Autoanalyzer.  Samples were corrected for a DI water blank and a reagent standard curve (4 concentrations) that was run for about 10 min every few hours.
